query:
-- Hot/warm project coverage after promotions
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN p.id END) as projects_with_send_ready,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) as total_send_ready_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm', 'cold');

-- Hot/warm project coverage after promotions
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN p.id END) as projects_with_send_ready,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) as total_send_ready_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm', 'cold');
